name: react-full
label: React + Tailwind + TypeScript + Python API + Postgres
description: Modern full-stack app with React frontend and Python backend

patterns.styling: Tailwind utility classes; no custom CSS unless necessary; use @apply for repeated patterns
patterns.state: React hooks + context for local state; React Query for server state
patterns.api_client: fetch() with typed responses; API base URL from env
patterns.backend: FastAPI or Flask; SQLAlchemy 2.0 with async; Alembic migrations
patterns.auth: JWT tokens; httpOnly cookies; refresh token rotation
patterns.validation: Zod on frontend; Pydantic on backend

registration.routes: Add route in src/App.tsx or src/router.tsx

deploy.backend: Docker compose or direct gunicorn deploy

never_do: Expose API keys in frontend code
always_do: Run npm run build before deploying

patterns.tables: Use responsive table component or card layout on sm:
patterns.sidebar: Hidden on mobile, toggle with hamburger (md:block)
patterns.forms: w-full on mobile, grid cols on md:
patterns.modals: Full screen on mobile (inset-0), centered on md:
patterns.navigation: Mobile: bottom nav or hamburger; Desktop: sidebar or top nav

mobile_css.convention: Mobile-first: base styles are mobile, add md: lg: for larger screens
